checks.detail: All 8 phases covered (brainstorm, create, plan, ship, verify, review, pr, close)
br, bv, omp, orchestrator, verification-before-completion all referenced
References other skills by name/purpose; does not inline their full content

requirements_met: .omp/skills/backbone/SKILL.md exists with valid YAML frontmatter (name, description)
Skill explains the backbone concept: br owns state, bv informs decisions, OMP executes
Skill includes a phase routing table mapping each phase to tools and artifacts
Skill defines the artifact directory layout with expected files per phase
Skill references other skills without duplicating their full content
Skill includes minimum checks (pre-flight) an agent must perform before acting in each phase
Skill does not conflict with existing skills, commands, or agents
